title: Field
description: A Field is an input or display element within a Page or Block, mapped from an Operational Attribute.

name.description: The snake_case name of the field, matching its Attribute name.

label.description: The human-readable label shown in the UI.

type.description: The display/input type of the field. Extends the Operational Attribute types with UI-only semantic variants (email, phone, url) that renderers can lift into typed inputs.

description.description: A human-readable explanation of what this field represents.

required.description: Whether this field is required in a form context.

readonly.description: When true, the field is display-only and cannot be edited.

attribute.description: The Operational Attribute this field maps from.
